title: Supreme Court issues notice to ECI on plea by BJP leader for biometric, facial recognition of voters before casting votes
description: The Supreme Court on Monday issued notice to the Central government and the Election Commission of India on a public interest litigation (PIL) petition filed by BJP leader Ashwini Kumar Upadhyay seeking biometric and facial recognition of voters before vote is cast.A Bench of Chief Justice of India (CJI) Surya Kant and Justice Joymalya Bagchi sought the response of the poll body and the government to the plea while also noting that the exercise will require a change in rules and will also involv
